adaptiveRetryMode.description: Control if adaptive retry mode will be used to more heavily client side rate limit EFS API requests

affinity.description: Affinity scheduling rules for the CSI controller service Deployment

deleteAccessPointRootDir.description: For dynamic provisioning, control whether the access point directory is deleted on unmount

logLevel.description: The log level of the driver's controller service

podAnnotations.description: The podAnnotations Schema for the CSI controller service Deployment

podLabels.description: The podLabels Schema for the CSI controller service Deployment

replicaCount.description: The number of replicas for the CSI controller service Deployment

resources.description: Resource requests/limits of the controller pod

rollingUpdate.description: Rolling update configuration for the CSI controller service Deployment strategy

timeout.description: Timeout for Create/DeleteVolume calls to Controller

tolerations.title: The tolerations Schema for the CSI controller service Deployment

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for the controller pod

volumeMounts.description: Add additional volume mounts on the controller

volumes.description: Add additional volumes to be mounted onto the controller

workerThreads.description: Number of concurrent threads controller will handle at once

debugLogs.description: Set klog verbosity to level 5 and enable debug logging in efs-utils.

logLevel.description: The log level of the driver's node service

maxInflightMountCalls.description: New NodePublishVolume operation will be blocked if maximum number of inflight calls is reached. If maxInflightMountCallsOptIn is true, it has to be set to a positive value.

maxInflightMountCallsOptIn.description: Opt in to use max inflight mount calls limit.

nodeSelector.description: The nodeSelector Schema for the CSI node service Dameonset

podAnnotations.description: The podAnnotations Schema for the CSI node service Dameonset

podLabels.description: The podLabels Schema for the CSI node service DaemonSet

resources.description: Resource requests/limits of the node DaemonSet

rollingUpdate.description: Rolling update configuration for the CSI node service DaemonSet updateStrategy

tolerations.title: The tolerations Schema for the CSI node service Deployment

updateStrategy.description: Override default strategy (RollingUpdate) to speed up deployment

volMetricsOptIn.description: Control whether or not to expose CSI volume usage metrics

volumeAttachLimit.description: Maximum number of volumes that can be attached to a node. If volumeAttachLimitOptIn is true, it has to be set to a positive value.

volumeAttachLimitOptIn.description: Opt in to use volume attach limit.

sidecars.description: Resource configuration for sidecar containers shared across controller and node pods

csiProvisioner.description: Configuration for the csi-provisioner sidecar container

resources.description: Resource requests/limits for the csi-provisioner sidecar

livenessProbe.description: Configuration for the liveness-probe sidecar container

nodeDriverRegistrar.description: Configuration for the csi-node-driver-registrar sidecar container

resources.description: Resource requests/limits for the csi-node-driver-registrar sidecar

useFIPS.description: Assert whether or not the driver uses FIPS enabled endpoints
